description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in that stage. Use the docker:19.03.12 Docker image together with the docker:19.03.12-dind service, and set the variable DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay. In the before_script execute the exact commands: apk update; apk add gcc; apk add bash; apk add musl-dev; apk add libffi-dev; apk add openssl-dev; apk add make; apk add python3-dev; apk add --no-cache py-pip; pip install docker-compose. In the script change to the server directory and run ./dev-bin/compose-test. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
